author: Vincent de Friburga
title: Expositio canonis sacri misse
remarks: He may have come across the writings of Magister Vinenz Gruner. He copied it with various minor and major alterations and omissions, and this effortless adaptation was called his work (Franz 534). Wissenschaftliche Stadtbibliothek Mainz, Hs I 39 (Inc: Ex multis causis sacra theologia est studenda)
